name: fork-stackedit
title: Fork StackEdit as KEDIT's editor engine
description: Per ADR-0001: fork StackEdit (Vue3/Vite/markdown-it, Apache-2.0) into the repo as the editor engine; get it building, running, and syncing to the GitHub private repo as pure .md (ADR-0002). Foundational — unblocks image-storage-model and all KEDIT feature work. markra design skin is a separate follow-up.
creator: Sakyvo
